description.ko: 오디오 신호와 디지털 물질 사이의 접점을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 보이지 않는 주파수가 복잡하고 박동하는 건축적 형태로 구체화되는 과정을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the intersection between audio signals and digital matter, where invisible frequencies manifest as complex, pulsating architectural forms.

prompt: A cinematic macro shot of fluid holographic sound waves rippling through a dark crystalline void. Intricate cymatic patterns forming in 3D space, vibrant neon prismatic light trails, pulsating geometric structures representing frequency spectrums, high-resolution digital art, 8k, ethereal lighting, kinetic energy.
